title: Epiphany Swarm Control Receipt
description: Generic receipt emitted after a coordinator-owned Epiphany control action. The receipt names the authority that made the final yes/no decision and the transport role that carried it out.

decisionOwner.description: Authority that made the final yes/no verdict. For Epiphany-owned launch and reorientation flows this is epiphany-core, not the transport bridge.

bridgeRole.description: What the bridge did for this action. Expected values are transport, translate, gatherHostFacts, executeSideEffects, and reportReceipt, alone or joined with '+'.

hostFacts.description: Host/runtime facts gathered by the bridge before execution, expressed as readable labels or artifact refs rather than private context.

sideEffects.description: Side effects the bridge performed after the core/coordinator verdict.
